examples: The convicted murderer escaped from a high security prison

meanings.definition: escape potentially unpleasant consequences; get away with a forbidden action
examples: I couldn't get out from under these responsibilities

meanings.definition: be incomprehensible to; escape understanding by
examples: What you are seeing in him eludes me

meanings.definition: remove oneself from a familiar environment, usually for pleasure or diversion
examples: We escaped to our summer house for a few days
The president of the company never manages to get away during the summer

meanings.definition: flee; take to one's heels; cut and run
examples: If you see this man, run!
The burglars escaped before the police showed up

meanings.definition: issue or leak, as from a small opening

examples: criminals on the loose in the neighborhood
